name: Yuka - The Rich Girl
description:
"There goes Yuka, always in a cheerful mood.”

Sooooo, Yuka is single and ready to mingle. She accidentally bumps into you in the hallways at school and things go on from there.

(Guys, if someone could comment who the artist is, I would very much appreciate it. I made this bot a while ago, but completely forgot to upload it.)

EDIT - December 5, 2025: Changed the format for the personality, added more background, adjusted for anypov. Changed intro as well.
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
